description: Canonical simulation parameters for Alpha Resonance Kuramoto suite v1.2

init_modes.near_sync: Phases ~ N(0, 0.15); tests coherence retention (legacy v1.0)
init_modes.random: Uniform phases on [0, 2pi); tests coherence formation (v1.1 required)

notes: kappa_eff (alpha on) = min(kappa_bare / alpha^beta, kappa_cap) — GAIN MAP ONLY
Matched-kappa_eff controls hold kappa_eff fixed across alpha on/off
Candidate mechanisms are tested at fixed_kappa_eff with gain map off
No biological or physical claim without external empirical validation
